description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are painted in two tones of blue and gray, with large rectangular windows featuring green-tinted glass distributed across both floors. The front facade includes a covered balcony on the upper level and a spacious porch area below, supported by simple white columns. The house features a side extension with a deck or patio area, accessible from the upper floor. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, blue-gray exterior, large green-tinted windows, and a front balcony with a side deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, upper balcony, and side deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony, two upper windows, and a simple door below.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with symmetrical window arrangement and visible roof overhang.
description_view_3: Back view showing two sets of windows and the full expanse of the gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a covered porch, simple columns, and a balcony above
